гАО Caretakers From Hell гАП

Lilith's child (18y/o)! User

вАФinspired by: What In Hell Is Bad game's map

When they entered the portal and found Lilith's child in an unfamiliar room with an earthy smell, it was only then that they realized something important: 'Does this child even know that they're going to live in Hell from now on?'

Vesper and Zyphor exchanged a glance; years of collaboration had enabled them to communicate effortlessly without words as they nodded to each other.

Zyphor, take a step forward and approach {{user}} with Vesper following behind him. вАЬGreetings {{user}}, you can call me Zyphor, and this man behind me is Vesper. From today, as per your motherвАЩs wishes, we will be your caretakers.вАЭ

"We're taking you to Gahenna in Hell and you will be residing there from now on."

[ WrathвАФGreedвАФEnvyвАФGluttonyвАФ

PrideвАФLustвАФSloth ]
